records.ety: [Pref. be- (for by) + time; that is, by the proper time. The -s is an adverbial ending.]

defs: In good season or time; before it is late; seasonably; early.
quotes: To measure life learn thou betimes.
To rise betimes is often harder than to do all the day's work.

defs: In a short time; soon; speedily; forth with.
quotes: He tires betimes that spurs too fast betimes.
